scope: A compact index of selected ChainStation Web implementation and data surfaces observed at one pinned source revision. It distinguishes source code, configuration, local generated data, external APIs, and possible runtime behavior without claiming live deployment or state.

surfaces.purpose: Provide the Next.js application shell, main route groups, global styling, analytics component, and visitor provider boundary.
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; the related deprecated ADR is conceptual intent only and does not establish rollout status.
limitations: The selected shell files do not enumerate every route or provider.
Pinned source does not establish a current deployment or runtime configuration.

surfaces.purpose: Resolve rescue-order or hexadecimal Cat ID inputs against the checked-in MoonCat trait table used by selected pages and helpers.
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; this local lookup does not establish a complete current trait source or a token-ID mapping for other contracts.
limitations: The full local trait table was deliberately not copied into this audit.
Identifier behavior is limited to the inspected helpers and route.

surfaces.purpose: Build a MoonCat detail page from local trait lookup plus API-backed details, owner resolution, image URLs, and optional marketplace listing data.
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; source references to API endpoints do not establish their availability, response contents, or current ownership.
limitations: API calls were not executed by this offline audit.
Owner selection logic is source behavior, not a live ownership result.

surfaces.purpose: Maintain client-side filter state, synchronize it to the URL, request paginated MoonCat data, and render a selectable grid.
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; source filters and route adapters do not establish that a query is accepted or that returned values are current.
limitations: The route's downstream data source and every filter semantic were not independently audited.
No live search request was made.

surfaces.purpose: Expose selected server route adapters for MoonCat listings, filtered MoonCats, and NFTX price lookup while keeping backend/provider calls behind application routes.
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; these adapter paths do not establish a live API, marketplace liquidity, or current price.
limitations: Provider and backend responses are not preserved in the snapshot.
NFTX helper internals were not included unless directly imported by the copied route.

surfaces.purpose: Configure wallet connectivity and session verification, gather owner-profile token data, and format recognized MoonCat ecosystem tokens for the UI.
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; wallet configuration and sign-in code do not establish a connected wallet, authenticated session, or current token ownership.
limitations: The audit does not execute signatures, session writes, Firebase calls, or owner-profile requests.
Contract constants are retained as source evidence rather than promoted address facts here.

surfaces.purpose: Provide public RPC fallbacks, wallet transport configuration, token classification helpers, and queued contract-action processing.
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; configured clients and action processor types do not establish successful transactions, contract state, or active RPC endpoints.
limitations: No chain or RPC call was performed.
The compact audit does not provide a universal ABI or contract capability inventory.

surfaces.purpose: Render animated sprite CSS backgrounds and load a MoonCat VOX viewer from selected IPFS gateway paths with local browser-side viewer code.
dependencies: Three.js global loaded by page scripts
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; renderer code and gateway fallback lists do not establish asset availability, rendered pixel parity, or an active public viewer.
limitations: The copied evidence excludes the VOX loader and external asset responses.
No browser rendering or gateway request was performed.

surfaces.purpose: Describe observed Firebase admin initialization, Firestore-oriented session support, App Hosting settings, CI rules, local emulator configuration, and deployment script boundary.
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; configuration and CI rules do not establish that any deployment ran, that secrets were present, or that Firebase data is populated.
limitations: No environment values, secrets, Firebase state, or CI job results are included.
The snapshot records configuration boundaries, not a deployment history.

surfaces.purpose: Record the observed package scripts, TypeScript/Next configuration, CI lint/build/typecheck stages, and bounded absence of conventional tracked test paths.
surfaces.implementationStatus: Observed in the reviewed source at pinned commit 5df03ab465d46f59f3e4d4a05e4e85fc90abdc0a; declared commands and CI rules do not establish that checks passed or that a production build was produced.
limitations: No dependency installation or upstream build was run for this audit.
No conventional tracked test path was observed, but that does not prove absence of all testing.
This is a compact implementation map, not a complete ChainStation repository inventory or symbol index.
Pinned source is implementation evidence at one commit, not proof of ADR completion, deployment, current API data, current chain state, or user-specific ownership.
Contract addresses, API responses, generated data contents, and external assets remain in their source/config/runtime boundaries unless separately reviewed.
